rows.label: qev019002_MSG0001
rows.name: Earthling, what on earth are you doing in a place like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Me? I have come to collect Miranium under the
instructions of my superior, San'eibu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0003
rows.name:
However, Frontier Net Spots are nowhere to be found,
and the place is swarming with native creatures...
I was at a loss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's amazing that you BLADEs managed to install
so many Data Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_JNK0010
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev019002_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him it's dangerous and he should go home quickly.

rows.label: qev019002_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev019002_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask why he is taking such risks without relying on BLADE.

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0005
rows.name: I agree with that opinion as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0006
rows.name:
I thought it would be more efficient to establish our
own mining route using our technological prowess[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0007
rows.name:
That is what I thought, but it seems installing Data Probes
is not a straightforward task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0008
rows.name:
Under these conditions, there is a 99.87% probability
that I will be preyed upon by native creatures and die
a pointless death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0009
rows.name:
That is already inefficient. I will return to NLA and
propose to San'eibu that we should rely on Earthling
specialists.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0010
rows.name:
Our technological prowess far surpasses that
of Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0011
rows.name:
Therefore, I thought it would be more efficient to establish
our own mining route without making requests[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0012
rows.name:
That is what I thought when I came here, but the sensors
I prepared are completely useless...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0013
rows.name:
I have realized that we should rely on specialists
like you after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0014
rows.name:
Under these conditions, there is a 99.87% probability
that I will be preyed upon by native creatures, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0015
rows.name:
I will return to NLA and propose to San'eibu that we
should do just that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Hmm, please excuse me then, Earthling.
Let us meet again somewhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0017
rows.name:
You were asked by San'eibu and came to rescue me,
didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0018
rows.name:
Thank you. Thanks to you, I avoided dying a
pointless death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019002_MSG0019
rows.name:
I couldn't obtain the Miranium, but... I was able to keep
losses to a minimum.[ST:wait ]
